headline: Is Prudential Financial (PRU) Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering if Prudential Financial at around US$99.95 is offering you good value today, or if the market is pricing it fairly already? The stock has seen a 0.9% decline over the last week, a 10.0% decline over the last month, and is down 12.2% year to date, while the 1 year return is a 7.2% decline and the 3 and 5 year returns sit at 17.9% and 37.1% respectively. Recent headlines around large US insurers have focused on balance sheet strength, capital returns to shareholders, and how life...
